locations.name: 塔毛利帕斯州
locations.summary: 塔毛利帕斯州（西班牙語：Tamaulipas，發音：[tamawˈlipas] ）是墨西哥東北部的一個州。面积79,384平方公里，人口3,024,238（2005.10.17）。 名称 塔毛利帕斯这个名字来源于Tamaholipa，这是…

locations.name: 韋拉克魯斯州
locations.summary: 韋拉克魯斯州（西班牙語：Veracruz，西班牙語發音：[beɾaˈkɾus]）是墨西哥的一個州，位於該國中部偏東，東部面向墨西哥灣。人口僅次於墨西哥州和聯邦區，居全國第三，首府哈拉帕。 正式州名為Veracruz de Ignacio…

relations.subject: Olive-throated parakeet
relations.evidence: It also inhabits the interior and edges of humid forest, riparian areas, scrublands, and more open landscapes such as plantations, clearings with trees, and gardens
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Olive-throated parakeet
relations.evidence: "Habitat loss and fragmentation are perhaps the greatest on-going threats"
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Olive-throated parakeet
relations.evidence: Some small-scale poaching for food and the pet trade contribute to the decline. It is considered common and widespread in Jamaica but is persecuted as a crop pest
relations.object_summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。
